body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 64 — paragraph 2 a (new)

## Text proposed by the Commission

*(no text)*

## Amendment of the European Parliament

2 a. Paragraphs 1 and 2 are without prejudice to the procedural rights of the concerned operator in accordance with Article 18 of Regulation (EU) 2019/1020.
parliament_text: 2 a. Paragraphs 1 and 2 are without prejudice to the procedural rights of the concerned operator in accordance with Article 18 of Regulation (EU) 2019/1020.
